name: xstockstrat — Ledger Query Events (Audit Replay)

nodes.name: Set Query Parameters
nodes.notes: Edit stream_key and event_type to filter events. Leave empty to query all. Increase limit for larger exports.

notes: Manual audit workflow: queries the ledger event store for replay and audit purposes. Edit 'Set Query Parameters' node to filter by stream_key (e.g. 'order.<id>') and/or event_type. Note: the roadmap spec named this endpoint 'replay-events' but the actual ledger service exposes 'query-events'.
